subcodes.first_line: Lo, We were established upon the Throne when there came a bird, circling round about the Throne with wings inscribed by the Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد کنا مستقرا علی العرش اذا اتت طیر و طافت حول العرش باجنحه رقم علیها من قلم
